ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer who took the loan */,
  "loan_status" INTEGER /* Current status of the loan */,
  "current_loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan at the current time */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan term */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "years_in_current_job" INTEGER /* Number of years the customer has been in their current job */,
  "home_ownership" INTEGER /* Home ownership status of the customer */,
  "purpose" INTEGER /* Purpose for which the loan was taken */,
  "monthly_debt" REAL /* Monthly debt amount of the customer */,
  "years_of_credit_history" REAL /* Total years the customer has a credit history */,
  "months_since_last_delinquent" REAL /* Number of months since the last delinquency */,
  "number_of_open_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts the customer has */,
  "number_of_credit_problems" INTEGER /* Number of credit problems the customer has had */,
  "current_credit_balance" REAL /* Current credit balance of the customer */,
  "maximum_open_credit" REAL /* Maximum open credit the customer has */,
  "bankruptcies" INTEGER /* Number of bankruptcies the customer has had */,
  "tax_liens" INTEGER /* Number of tax liens against the customer */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applied to the loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Original loan amount */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of loan payments (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled payment */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made */,
  "total_payments_made" INTEGER /* Total number of payments made so far */,
  "total_principal_paid" REAL /* Total principal amount paid so far */,
  "total_interest_paid" REAL /* Total interest amount paid so far */,
  "remaining_principal" REAL /* Remaining principal amount to be paid */,
  "default_likelihood_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of loan default */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the employee who approved the loan */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was approved */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_term FOREIGN KEY ("term") REFERENCES loan_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_home_ownership FOREIGN KEY ("home_ownership") REFERENCES home_ownership ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_status FOREIGN KEY ("loan_status") REFERENCES loan_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES loan_purposes ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (encrypted for security) */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the customer portal */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., active, suspended, closed) */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the customer based on historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose for which the loan is taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of home ownership */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of home ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan data */,
  "loan_id" TEXT /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, analyst, manager) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
